column1: # Records to import into Pathologies.zip, one per line, TAB-separated.
# Columns:  record <TAB> id <TAB> title <TAB> name <TAB> group
#   record : .hea path (abs or relative to --dataset, extension optional), OR a
#            bare record name searched for recursively under --dataset.
#   id     : pathology id / .dat filename stem   (optional; default = slug of record)
#   title  : English title                        (optional; default = record name)
#   group  : group key from groups.txt            (optional; default = --group, else none)
# Lines starting with '#' and blank lines are ignored. Leave a cell empty for its default.
# Group keys (from groups.txt): sinus, arrhythmia, conduction, hypertrophy, ischemia,
#   infarction, electrolyte, syndromes, pacemaker, special, pediatric, newborn,
